llm_advice.rationale: Baseline shows no speedup due to multiple ATen GEMM and add launches. Fusing the rank-16 path (B.T @ X, A @ result, add to Y) into a single custom kernel eliminates launch overhead and intermediate memory traffic, while keeping cuBLAS for the large W @ X GEMM avoids regressing the dominant term. Starting with a scalar kernel minimizes risk, then vectorized (float4) can improve memory throughput.

notes: Use ATen/cuBLAS for the d x d GEMM.
Explore kernels that fuse Y += A @ T for rank 16.
